memoryArtifacts.headline: Sanquhar Castle was built by the Crichton family in the 13th century.
memoryArtifacts.description: Sanquhar Castle, now a ruin, was built by the Crichton family in the 13th century. Situated on the southern approach to the former royal burgh of Sanquhar in Dumfries and Galloway, south west Scotland, it sits on the trail of the Southern Upland Way

zh.lifeSummary: 當Marion Margaret Maxwell於1472年4月4日出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾時，她的父親Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood43歲，母親Janet Boyd50歲。她於1490年與Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1527年7月10日在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋桑哈爾享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾度福利斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marion Margaret Maxwell于1472年4月4日出生在苏格兰度福利爾时，她的父亲Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood43岁，母亲Janet Boyd50岁。她于1490年与Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1527年7月10日在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋桑哈爾享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰度福利爾度福利斯。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Marion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Marion Margaret Maxwell was born on 4 April 1472, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood, was 43 and her mother, Janet Boyd, was 50. She married Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar in 1490, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 10 July 1527, in Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marion Margaret Maxwell est née le 4 avril 1472, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Janet Boyd, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar en 1490, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 juillet 1527, à Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

ja.lifeSummary: Marion Margaret Maxwellが1472年4月4日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Maxwell of Calderwoodは43歳，母Janet Boydは50歳であった。1490年にスコットランドでSir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquharと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1527年7月10日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイサンクハーで55歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダムフリーズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marion Margaret Maxwell(이)가 1472년 4월 4일 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Boyd(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1490년 스컷랜드에서 Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1527년 7월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 산크하르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드프리스에 묻혔다.

ru.Sanquhar Castle, Dumfries and Galloway,: санкухар, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marion Margaret Maxwell родилась 4 апреля 1472 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Maxwell of Calderwood было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Boyd, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert II Crichton, Second Lord Crichton of Sanquhar в 1490 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 10 июля 1527 г. в местности санкухар, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности думфриесь, думфриессхир, Шотландия.

Murió el 10 de julio de 1527, en Sanquhar, Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Dumfries, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.
